paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.68, with a change of 0.45% compared to the prior close and a change of -25.53% over the last 22 sessions.

Recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, set for August 13, 2026, as well as discussions about the company's recent stock performance and governance concerns. A director designee, Miles Everson, resigned citing governance concerns, and the company completed a $375 million offering of convertible senior notes.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. One Form 4 filing is included in the total of 25 filings in the feed.
